description: Returns a paginated list of sanctions, optionally filtered by target user.

targetUserId.description: Filter sanctions by the sanctioned user's ID.

limit.description: Maximum number of sanctions to return.

output.description: Paginated list of sanction records and a cursor for the next page.

fields.nextCursor: string|null — cursor for the next page, null when no more pages

notes: Sanction object contains: data (object with type e.g. 'BAN' and reason string), plus other metadata fields. The direction parameter controls cursor traversal order.
